profile.description: minimal keeps boot fast; default installs additional developer tooling. If omitted, default is used.

image.description: Reserved for future prebuilt image/channel selection.

manifest.description: Base layer manifest for cache invalidation and toolchain configuration. Changing this section forces a rebuild of the cached base image.

dev.description: Development environment configuration. Inspired by smolvm's Smolfile [dev] table.

init.description: Commands to run once when the workspace base layer is built.
